allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add efficiency calculation between charges in ChargeDetailModal

- Calculate distance traveled since previous charge \(odometer delta\)
- Show efficiency in kWh/100km using real kWh \(with charger efficiency\)
- Display in a dedicated blue-themed section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add BatteryStatusModal with AI SoH and editable target SoC

- Create LiveVehicleStatus card showing real-time battery % from Smartcar
- Create BatteryStatusModal with:
  - Current SoC and estimated kWh \(using AI SoH when available\)
  - Battery capacity info \(nominal, SoH with AI indicator, usable\)
  - Editable target SoC \(click value to enter custom 50-100%\)
  - Quick select buttons for 80/85/90/95/100%
  - Auto-import charges toggle
  - Stop charge button when charging
- Move Time stat from Overview to Trends tab
- Replace Time with LiveVehicleStatus in Overview
- Remove Target SoC and Auto-import from SettingsModal \(now in BatteryStatusModal\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: handle SoC stored as percentage or decimal in LiveVehicleStatus and BatteryStatusModal

- Detect if lastSoC is stored as decimal \(0-1\) or percentage \(0-100\)
- Normalize to correct format before displaying

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(for func in ping bydConnect bydDisconnect bydGetRealtime bydGetGps bydGetCharging bydLock bydUnlock bydStartClimate bydStopClimate bydFlashLights bydCloseWindows bydSeatClimate bydBatteryHeat bydWakeVehicle bydDiagnostic bydGetMqttCredentials bydActiveTripMonitor bydIdleHeartbeat bydFixTrip bydDebug)
